overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA IV showing the character Niko Bellic walking along a waterfront promenade in Liberty City. The character moves from a shaded area under an overpass into bright sunlight along the water, with the Broker Bridge and industrial skyline visible in the background, eventually ascending stairs to an elevated walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront promenade under highway overpass

events.description: character exits the covered overpass into bright direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered promenade beneath the concrete overpass

notable_agents.action: sitting on wooden bench wearing orange shirt

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating a roof over the walkway
thick support column for the overpass structure
light-colored wooden park bench along the railing
black metal railing separating walkway from water
large suspension bridge visible through the overpass openings
factory smokestacks emitting smoke across the water

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered waterfront promenade beneath a massive concrete overpass. The area is dimly lit with support pillars lining the path, wooden benches placed along the railing, and a view of the bridge and industrial smokestacks visible through the openings. An NPC sits on a bench to the left as the character moves toward the bright exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with hexagonal paving

agents.ego_description: walking along the sunlit waterfront promenade with the bridge visible ahead across the water

entered.detail: light-colored hexagonal tile pattern covering the walkway surface
black ornate street lamp posts lining the waterfront
tall contemporary skyscrapers with reflective glass facades
white metal park benches facing the water
green leafy trees lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Emerging into bright sunlight, the scene opens onto a wide waterfront promenade with hexagonal paving stones. The Broker Bridge spans the water to the left with industrial smokestacks visible on the far shore, while modern glass skyscrapers rise on the right. The character walks steadily along the water's edge past street lamps and benches.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor staircase with stone walls leading upward

events.description: character approaches the modern staircase structure at the end of the promenade
character begins ascending the concrete stairs to the elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: approaching and climbing the concrete stairs toward the elevated walkway

entered.detail: textured stone block wall with grassy slope above
contemporary architectural canopy over the staircase entrance
wide concrete staircase with metal railings on both sides
chain link safety fencing along the stair sides

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a modern architectural staircase at the end of the promenade. Stone retaining walls line the path as the character begins ascending the concrete steps toward an elevated walkway, with contemporary buildings visible above and metal safety fencing along the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian bridge with chain link fencing

events.description: character reaches the top of the stairs and enters the elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated pedestrian bridge with chain link fences on both sides

entered.detail: concrete pedestrian bridge elevated above ground level
metal chain link safety fencing along the walkway edges
metal chain link safety fencing along the walkway edges
curved metal framework forming an arch over the walkway ahead

segments.scene_description: Reaching the top of the stairs, the character enters an elevated pedestrian walkway enclosed by chain link fences on both sides. The modern metal structure curves ahead with arched framework overhead and the city skyline visible in the background, creating an urban corridor above the waterfront.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded industrial underpass into a bright, open waterfront promenade that eventually ascends to an elevated urban walkway. It begins in the dim light beneath a massive concrete overpass, moving past support pillars and wooden benches toward a bright exit. As the character emerges into the sunlight, the scene opens onto a wide promenade of hexagonal paving stones, flanked by the Broker Bridge and industrial smokestacks on one side and modern glass skyscrapers on the other. The camera then follows the character toward a set of modern architectural stairs, ascending the concrete steps past stone retaining walls and metal safety fencing. Finally, the movement concludes as the character reaches the top and enters a curved pedestrian walkway enclosed by chain link fences and arched metal framework, overlooking the city skyline.
